retry_reason: put_device is conditional on non-null backlight_dev; if the refcount were already zero it would indicate a double-free bug, so retry is meaningless.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to remove and clean up the HID device (set mode off, unregister handler, close/stop hardware). The put_device call is one incidental step in the broader teardown logic, not the main focus of the function.
